visa.issued_by: Vietnam Immigration Department - Ministry of Public Security
visa.REQUIRED: HARD COPY at immigration — soft copies NOT accepted. Print before departure!

return.checkin_rule: Report 2 hours before departure. Check-in closes 1 hour before.

backup_plans.flight_cancelled: Rebook via VietJet/Vietnam Airlines. Claim travel insurance. Hotel extra night ~₹1000.
backup_plans.lost_baggage: File report at airport. Buy essentials at local market (₹500-1000). Track via airline app.
backup_plans.medical_emergency: Vinmec Hospital (Hanoi/HCMC) — English speaking. FV Hospital (HCMC). Travel insurance covers.
backup_plans.hotel_problem: Booking.com 24/7 support. Backup: Agoda same-day booking. Hostelworld for budget.
backup_plans.severe_weather_halong: CANCEL cruise. Backup day: Water Puppet Theatre + Ceramic Mural + Hanoi museums.
backup_plans.severe_weather_sapa: Skip cable car. Backup: Sapa Museum + indoor cafes + local market.
backup_plans.lost_phone: Use hotel wifi to contact via email. Backup: Buy local SIM + cheap phone (₹2000).
backup_plans.money_theft: Emergency funds via Western Union. Card freeze immediately. File police report for insurance.

insurance_check: Verify travel insurance covers Vietnam + adventure activities
critical_info: Save offline maps of all cities before landing
